moments.title: Tour de France races to a finish
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is in its final stages, with the peloton tackling Stage 17 today before concluding on Sunday, July 26, in Paris.

angles.name: General excitement
angles.copy: The yellow jersey is on the line! The Tour de France is in its final few days, culminating in Paris this Sunday. Who are you backing for glory? #TDF2026

angles.name: Daily stage focus
angles.copy: Today is Stage 17 of the Tour de France! Get ready for another day of epic cycling as the race hurtles towards its grand finale on Sunday.

moments.title: Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow is set to host the Commonwealth Games 2026, with the opening ceremony taking place tomorrow, July 23, and events running until August 3.

angles.name: Opening excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games kick off tomorrow in Glasgow! Get ready for almost two weeks of incredible sport and inspiring athletes right here in the UK.

angles.name: Scottish pride
angles.copy: Glasgow is ready! The Commonwealth Games start tomorrow – who's excited to see Scotland on the world stage for this incredible sporting event?

moments.title: Premier League pre-season friendlies continue
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are deep into their pre-season schedules, with Nottingham Forest facing Blackburn today and Crystal Palace playing Bromley on Saturday, July 25.

angles.name: Football fix
angles.copy: Missing the Premier League? Pre-season friendlies are in full swing! Nottingham Forest take on Blackburn today – who are you hoping shines before the season proper?

angles.name: Club focus
angles.copy: Crystal Palace fans, get ready! Your Eagles are in action this Saturday against Bromley. What are your hopes for the new season?

moments.title: Chelsea FC in Sydney for friendly
moments.blurb: Chelsea FC will play a pre-season friendly against Western Sydney Wanderers at Accor Stadium on Tuesday, July 28.

angles.name: Blues Down Under
angles.copy: Chelsea are heading Down Under! The Blues face Western Sydney Wanderers next Tuesday in a pre-season clash. Will you be staying up late to watch?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart update
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Top 40 for July 16-22 has been compiled, with Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holding the #1 spot for a 57th week.

angles.name: Chart topper
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are holding onto the Official Singles Chart #1 this week with 'Rein Me In'. What a run!

angles.name: Chart surprises
angles.copy: Oasis's 'Wonderwall' is still in the Top 5 of the Official Singles Chart! Some classics never fade. What's your favourite old-school chart hit?

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a diverse music and arts event, begins tomorrow, July 23, and runs until July 26 at Henham Park in Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival vibes
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival starts tomorrow, bringing four days of music, comedy, and arts to Henham Park. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Last minute prep
angles.copy: Latitude countdown: T-minus one day! Sun cream? Check. Wellies (just in case)? Check. Good vibes? Absolutely! Have an amazing time everyone!

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival brings rock to Wales
moments.blurb: The Steelhouse Festival, known for its rock and metal lineup, takes place from July 24-26 in Ebbw Vale, South Wales.

angles.name: Rock out Wales
angles.copy: Calling all rock fans in Wales! Steelhouse Festival kicks off on Thursday for three days of heavy riffs and epic performances in Ebbw Vale. Who's heading to the mountain?

angles.name: Festival weekend
angles.copy: The mountain is calling! Steelhouse Festival is almost here, bringing the best in rock and metal to South Wales this weekend. Get ready to turn it up!

moments.title: Big Love Festival celebrates 10th year in South Wales
moments.blurb: Big Love Festival, a small four-day music festival, is celebrating its 10th year this July in the South Wales countryside, 35 minutes from Bristol & Cardiff.

angles.name: Local festival fun
angles.copy: Happy 10th Birthday, Big Love Festival! This fantastic small festival is happening right now in the beautiful South Wales countryside. Who's enjoying the vibes?

angles.name: South Wales highlight
angles.copy: If you're looking for good times and great music, Big Love Festival is celebrating a decade of fun in South Wales this month! What's your favourite festival memory?

moments.title: Summer Nights at the Bandstand returns to Glasgow
moments.blurb: The Summer Nights at the Bandstand series of concerts begins on Monday, July 27, and runs until August 15 in Glasgow.

angles.name: Glasgow music
angles.copy: Summer Nights at the Bandstand is back! This iconic Glasgow concert series kicks off on Monday, bringing amazing artists to the city. Who are you hoping to see?

moments.title: Happy 85th to George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk legend George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday today, July 22.

angles.name: Funk icon
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton! What's your favourite Parliament-Funkadelic track to get down to?

angles.name: Musical influence
angles.copy: Celebrating 85 years of pure funk! George Clinton's influence is undeniable. From 'Flash Light' to 'Atomic Dog', his music shaped generations.

moments.title: Happy 34th to Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday today, July 22.

angles.name: Pop star birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 34th Birthday to the one and only Selena Gomez! What's your favourite Selena song?

angles.name: Music and acting
angles.copy: From Disney to chart-topper, Happy Birthday to Selena Gomez! 34 today and still dominating the music and acting worlds.

moments.title: Happy 79th to Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, legendary drummer and vocalist for the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 22.

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Eagles legend Don Henley! From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, what's your favourite track featuring his iconic voice?

angles.name: Eagles tribute
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Don Henley! The voice behind so many classic Eagles tracks is 79 today. Turn up an Eagles hit to celebrate!

moments.title: Happy 65th to Keith Sweat
moments.blurb: R&B icon Keith Sweat, known for hits like 'Twisted' and 'Nobody', celebrates his 65th birthday today, July 22.

angles.name: R&B legend
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the New Jack Swing King, Keith Sweat! Time to put on some 'I Want Her' and celebrate a true R&B legend.

angles.name: Smooth R&B
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy Birthday to Keith Sweat! 65 today and still bringing those smooth R&B vibes. What's your favourite Keith Sweat slow jam?

moments.title: Happy 82nd to Rick Davies
moments.blurb: Rick Davies, co-founder, vocalist, and keyboardist of the progressive rock band Supertramp, celebrates his 82nd birthday today, July 22.

angles.name: Supertramp frontman
angles.copy: Happy 82nd Birthday to Supertramp's Rick Davies! From 'Bloody Well Right' to 'Goodbye Stranger', his unique sound defined an era. What's your top Supertramp track?

moments.title: Buckingham Palace Summer Opening continues
moments.blurb: Buckingham Palace's State Rooms are open to visitors for its annual summer opening, running from July 9 to September 27, 2026.

angles.name: Royal visit
angles.copy: Fancy a glimpse into royal life? Buckingham Palace's State Rooms are open for summer! A perfect day out in London.

angles.name: London summer
angles.copy: The summer opening of Buckingham Palace is a must-see! Explore the lavish State Rooms and admire treasures from the Royal Collection.

moments.title: Charlie Puth plays Manchester tonight
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Charlie Puth performs tonight, July 22, at Manchester Academy 1.

angles.name: Manchester music
angles.copy: Manchester! Are you ready for Charlie Puth tonight? He's at Manchester Academy 1 – get ready for a night of hits!

moments.title: Vanessa Carlton live in Manchester
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Vanessa Carlton is set to perform at Band On The Wall in Manchester on Tuesday, July 28.

angles.name: A Thousand Miles
angles.copy: Manchester, get ready to sing along! Vanessa Carlton brings 'A Thousand Miles' and more to Band On The Wall next Tuesday. Who's got tickets?
